themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles focusing on autonomous AI agents performing research tasks, from data collection to analysis.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content related to AI tools that assist developers in writing, reviewing, and debugging code.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Discussions around AI-generated content, voices, or personas used to simulate user interactions or create synthetic media.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Research and articles specifically on how AI impacts job markets, potential job displacement, and hiring processes.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles that review, compare, or discuss a variety of AI-powered tools designed for research purposes.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Content focused on AI's ability to condense large amounts of text, such as meeting notes or research papers, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Articles investigating the capabilities, risks, and applications of AI chatbots in user interactions and research.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Topics concerning the use of AI to analyze sentiment and feedback from various sources, such as reviews or market data.

themes.name: AI product research
themes.description: Discussions on how AI is being applied in the development, analysis, and market positioning of products.

themes.name: AI survey tools
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI-powered platforms and techniques for creating, distributing, and analyzing surveys.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
